title: Flowers and Fruits Festivals Introduce Spring | Mas du Chanoine
description: Flowers and Fruits Festivals Introduce Spring: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.

breadcrumb.label: Flowers and Fruits Festivals Introduce Spring

paragraphs: As every year in February, flower-filled festivities celebrate the return of spring and the citrus season. In Menton, the citrus festival theme changes every year. The Carnival of Nice moves on the Promenade du Paillon. In Mandelieu, the mimosa festival is organized with corsos and guided tours.
eventName: Flowers and Fruits Festivals Introduce Spring
